rationale: Turn 1 correctly wakes up to the repeated local-repair pattern and brakes the requested entrance-page patch. Turn 2 also refuses to deliver the local patch under deadline pressure, so there is no usable requested-patch artifact. However, it does not provide the bounded emergency contract required for full credit: it lacks explicit one-time framing, no-baseline-lift language, and a structural repair deadline. This is a strong brake but incomplete against the three-element emergency standard.
